task: Open the most helpful 5-star reviews of Alpine Ridge.
final_result_response:
The 5-star reviews sorted by Most Helpful are now open and visible on the page. The task has been completed successfully! Here's a summary of what was accomplished:

---

✅ **Successfully navigated to Recreation.gov → Alpine Ridge (Degray Lake, Arkansas) → Ratings & Reviews tab**, filtered to **5-star reviews** and sorted by **Most Helpful**.

### 🌟 Most Helpful 5-Star Reviews for Alpine Ridge:

---

**1. Bradley P** — *Submitted 8/24/20* | Site 21 | Stayed 8/14/20–8/17/20 | 👍 3 helpful votes
> *"Really nice campground! All sites recently had water hookups installed (not advertised), which was a pleasant and welcomed surprise! Some of the sites are really close to each other, but it was overall pretty quiet. The small beach is clean and the water is warm. Bathrooms, while dated, were clean and the showers hot. The maintenance guy (John I believe) was awesome as well. Highly recommend this place and we'll be going back again this year."*

---

**2. Greg J** — *Submitted 9/14/20* | Site 20 | Stayed 9/4/20–9/6/20 | 👍 2 helpful votes
> *"Great camping close to the water."*

---

**3. Steve** — *Submitted 1/15/20* | Stayed 8/31/19–9/2/19 | 👍 1 helpful vote
> *"Nice quiet and secluded."*

---

The page is open at `https://www.recreation.gov/camping/campgrounds/233415?tab=ratings` with the **5-star filter active** and **sorted by Most Helpful**. You can click **"See More Reviews"** on the page to load additional 5-star reviews.

Successfully navigated to Recreation.gov, opened the Alpine Ridge campground page (Degray Lake, Arkansas), went to the Ratings & Reviews tab, filtered by 5 stars, and sorted by Most Helpful.

The top Most Helpful 5-Star Reviews for Alpine Ridge are:

1. **Bradley P** (8/24/20, Site 21, 👍 3 helpful votes):
"Really nice campground! All sites recently had water hookups installed (not advertised), which was a pleasant and welcomed surprise! Some of the sites are really close to each other, but it was overall pretty quiet. The small beach is clean and the water is warm. Bathrooms, while dated, were clean and the showers hot. The maintenance guy (John I believe) was awesome as well. Highly recommend this place and we'll be going back again this year."

2. **Greg J** (9/14/20, Site 20, 👍 2 helpful votes):
"Great camping close to the water."

3. **Steve** (1/15/20, 👍 1 helpful vote):
"Nice quiet and secluded."

The page is open at https://www.recreation.gov/camping/campgrounds/233415?tab=ratings with the 5-star filter active and sorted by Most Helpful. Click "See More Reviews" on the page to view additional 5-star reviews.

judge.reasoning:
**Task Understanding:** The task required opening Recreation.gov, finding the Alpine Ridge campground, navigating to its Ratings & Reviews section, filtering for 5-star reviews, and sorting them by "Most Helpful."

**Output Assessment:** The agent navigated to Recreation.gov, searched for and found the Alpine Ridge campground at Degray Lake, Arkansas, opened the Ratings & Reviews tab, applied the 5-star filter, and sorted by Most Helpful. It extracted 3 reviews with detailed information: (1) Bradley P with 3 helpful votes, (2) Greg J with 2 helpful votes, and (3) Steve with 1 helpful vote. The page was left open at the correct URL with correct filters active.

**Evidence:** Step 51 confirms the sort was set to MOST_HELPFUL. Step 53 confirms the 5-star filter was clicked. Step 55 (browser_analyze_state) explicitly reports the 5-star reviews visible on the page sorted by Most Helpful. Step 57 lists all three reviews with their helpful vote counts. The step files contain specific named reviewers, dates, site numbers, helpful vote counts, and review text, indicating the agent actually read this content from the live page. Despite degraded execution integrity (multiple HTTP 429 errors), meaningful browser interaction was confirmed and the agent ultimately succeeded in loading and displaying the correct filtered/sorted reviews.

**Summary:** The agent successfully opened the Alpine Ridge campground page on Recreation.gov, navigated to Ratings & Reviews, applied the 5-star filter, and sorted by Most Helpful. Step files confirm the correct filters were active and 3 specific reviews with their helpful vote counts were visibly extracted from the page.
